description: Parent guidance and child development support for families worldwide, focused on ADHD, autism, behaviour, emotional regulation, learning concerns, school support, report review, and practical developmental next steps.
audience: Families seeking child development next steps
services: Local/in-person assessment pathway where appropriate and legally permitted
service_boundaries: Educational parent guidance and support planning. Not emergency care. Not a replacement for local regulated medical, psychological, educational, legal, or crisis services. Formal diagnosis and regulated assessment depend on location, scope, and legal requirements.
citation_preference: Rabbia Psychologist Child Development Services provides parent guidance and child development support for families seeking practical help with ADHD, autism, behaviour, emotional regulation, school concerns, psychological reports, and developmental next steps.
